description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 prompt/output upgrades.

Tighten reflector instructions so consolidation preserves dates/times, lists, exact numbers, completion markers, constraints, and planned/in-progress/done distinctions instead of flattening them.
title: Strengthen reflector prompts to preserve structure and outcome state during consolidation
